name: testAddAdminAndSighInAsAdmin
description: Add a new user and verify that all fields, statuses, and icons are correctly displayed(e2e).

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select a company into 'Select company' filter field
Set checked 'Allowed business units' checkboxes by business units names
Verify: a success alert appears after user creation
Verify: selected company is displayed in the 'Select company' field
Verify: new user's email is displayed in the table
